# Architect Skill Manifest

## Purpose

Support architecture authoring flows with phased, minimal context loads.

## Boundaries

- In scope: SON->SRD, ADR, AD2, impact analysis, story breakdown templates.
- Out of scope: code review standards, OHIP mode implementation, tax engine details.

## Primary Files by Concern

- Orchestration: `archon/SKILL.md`
- Overview: `ARCHITECT_DOMAIN_OVERVIEW.md`
- Templates: `SON_TO_SRD_TEMPLATE.md`, `IMPACT_ANALYSIS_TEMPLATE.md`, `STORY_BREAKDOWN_TEMPLATE.md`, `AD2_FEAXXXX_FULL.md`, `ADR_FEAXXXX_Topic.md`

## Loading Objective

Select one target deliverable first, then load only its template.
